skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-bitable</name>
    <description>飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-bitable/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-calendar</name>
    <description>飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-calendar/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-channel-rules</name>
    <description>飞书渠道输出规则。所有飞书对话中始终激活。约束 AI 输出格式，防止输出原始卡片 JSON。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-channel-rules/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-create-doc</name>
    <description>创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-create-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-fetch-doc</name>
    <description>获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 fetch-media 工具）。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-fetch-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-im-read</name>
    <description>飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-im-read/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-task</name>
    <description>飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-task/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-troubleshoot</name>
    <description>飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-troubleshoot/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-update-doc</name>
    <description>更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-update-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>tmux</name>
    <description>Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/tmux/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>image-generate</name>
    <description>使用内置 image_generate.py 脚本生成图片, 准备清晰具体的 `prompt`。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/image-generate/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>VeADK-Go 技能集合</name>
    <description>根据用户的功能需求，完成与 VeADK-Go 相关的功能; 包括：直接根据需求生成 Agent；将Enio Agent转换为VeADK-Go Agent。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/veadk-go-skills/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>VeADK 技能集合</name>
    <description>根据用户的功能需求，完成与 VeADK 相关的功能。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/veadk-skills/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>video-generate</name>
    <description>使用 video_generate.py 脚本生成视频，需要提供文件名和 prompt，可选提供首帧图片（URL或本地路径）。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/video-generate/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>
